title: Update gometalinter to fix install.tools error
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Fixes 'make install.tools'.  I originally tried a new gometalinter, but runc wasn't happy with that.  This change adds the GOPATH to the gometalinter command so it will executed in and out of Travis.  Previously 'make install.tools' was failing at the command line.

Addresses #689
